name: ai-cost-tracker
description: Zero-config status-bar widget that shows Cursor monthly cost and quota. Install and forget — no extra CLI, no PATH setup.

aiCostTracker.refreshIntervalSec.description: How often to refresh from Cursor's dashboard API, in seconds.

aiCostTracker.staleAfterSec.description: If no successful refresh in this many seconds, the status bar shows a warning indicator.

aiCostTracker.format.markdownDescription:
Status bar template. Available variables:

- `${cost}` — current billing cycle usage cost, e.g. `$344.27`
- `${tokens}` — total tokens this cycle (input+output+cache)
- `${quota}` — best quota fragment, e.g. ` · 34% used`; empty if no quota applies
- `${quotaPct}` — quota percent, e.g. `34%`
- `${membership}` — Cursor membership tier

commands.title: AI Cost Tracker: Show raw cycle data (JSON)
AI Cost Tracker: Show status bar item
AI Cost Tracker: Force re-read state DB
AI Cost Tracker: Run token probe (diagnostic)

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run copy-wasm && npm run compile
scripts.package: npm run copy-wasm && npm run compile && mkdir -p dist-vsix && vsce package --out dist-vsix/ai-cost-tracker-$npm_package_version.vsix
